name: TestWaitForMostMPR
title: TestWaitForMostMPR
syntax: long TestWaitForMostMPR(long aValue, unsigned long aTimeout);
description: The function waits until the expiration of the time aTimeout for the occurrence of the MOST event of a change of the Maximum Position Registers (MPR).
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aValue
parameters.description: Expected value of the maximum position register that should be in the MOST event. The specification -1 (wildcard) stands for any values.
